/usr/bin/c++  -Wall -Wextra -g CMakeFiles/AdministratorBloc.dir/main.cpp.o CMakeFiles/AdministratorBloc.dir/domain/locatar.cpp.o CMakeFiles/AdministratorBloc.dir/domain/validator.cpp.o CMakeFiles/AdministratorBloc.dir/repo/repo_locatari.cpp.o CMakeFiles/AdministratorBloc.dir/service/service_locatari.cpp.o CMakeFiles/AdministratorBloc.dir/ui/ui.cpp.o CMakeFiles/AdministratorBloc.dir/tests/tests_domain.cpp.o CMakeFiles/AdministratorBloc.dir/tests/tests_repo.cpp.o CMakeFiles/AdministratorBloc.dir/tests/tests_service.cpp.o CMakeFiles/AdministratorBloc.dir/notification_list/lista_notificare.cpp.o CMakeFiles/AdministratorBloc.dir/tests/tests_lista_notificare.cpp.o CMakeFiles/AdministratorBloc.dir/utils/file_utils.cpp.o -o AdministratorBloc
